title: Rider
subTitle: As love blossoms between orphans Chinnu and Kitty, fate separates them as children. However, they grow up yearning to find each other.

title: Surya Ka Yaarana
subTitle: A soldier going on a rescue mission, hears about his father's death by lung cancer and mournfully looks back on his memories of how he helped him in matters of love and life.

title: Fun2ssh
subTitle: Three men accidentally end up in the 10th century while being on the run. As they navigate the new world, they attempt to go back home and prove their innocence.

title: Jeene Do - Let Us Live
subTitle: An up-and-coming cyclist arrives in Mumbai for the final round of a championship. But his life takes a 180 degree turn when he discovers his family's painful past and sets out to avenge them.

title: Anjaniputra
subTitle: A businessman saves a policeman from a group of thugs. As a result, he incurs the wrath of a ruthless local gangster who is also an assassin.

title: Balloon
subTitle: Jeevanand rents an old house in Ooty with his wife and nephew hoping to find inspiration to write a script. However, strange events begin unfolding in the house which are linked to his past.

title: Power Unlimited 2
subTitle: Karthikeya, a man who is devoted to his family, faces a huge challenge as his violent and turbulent past begins to resurface.

title: Madhagaja
subTitle: The wife of one of two rival dons sends her son to a distant land to shield him from their relentless feud. However, the son, raised as an orphan, eventually returns to the brutal world of violence.

title: Jack
subTitle: Prasad is struggling to understand his good-for-nothing son, Pablo Neruda. Determined to find out about his son's activities, he hires a private investigator, Afshana.

title: Kabali
subTitle: When Kabali raises his voice against the oppression faced by Tamil labourers in Malaysia, he is imprisoned for 25 years. After being released, he seeks revenge on the ones who wronged him.

title: Kabali
subTitle: When Kabali raises his voice against the oppression faced by Tamil labourers in Malaysia, he is imprisoned for 25 years. After being released, he seeks revenge on the ones who wronged him.

title: Action Blaster
subTitle: Anil Anto, a TV operator, moves to Kochi with his pregnant wife in order to start a new life. There, Anil crosses paths with Darvin, a gangster, post an unfortunate incident.

title: Chakravarthy
subTitle: Shankar, a humble youth from Madikeri, Karnataka, moves to Bengaluru in search of a job. However, his life changes drastically once he becomes an underworld gangster.

title: F2: Fun and Frustration
subTitle: Two young men hope to control their wives after their respective marriages. However, their chauvinistic attitude often lands them in hilarious situations.

title: Daring Gundaraaj
subTitle: Jagan falls for Sunanda, who happens to be the daughter of his father's business rival. Further hilarity ensues when the two tycoons unknowingly broker a match between their love-struck children.

title: Express Khiladi
subTitle: A pantry worker and a make-up artist develop a romance aboard a runaway train, where they must confront dangerous challenges to save themselves and others.

title: Sapthagiri LLB
subTitle: Sapthagiri, a small-town lawyer, reopens a high-profile case in hopes of gaining fame. However, he soon finds himself up against Sai Kumar, a formidable opponent and one of the country's finest lawyers.

title: Captain
subTitle: A captain leads his team of soldiers inside a forest to investigate mysterious disappearances. However, they soon realise that the danger is more than they bargain for.

title: Bholaa Shankar
subTitle: A cab driver in Calcutta struggles to rebuild his life with his sister while confronting a haunting past. Subsequently, he fights to protect his future and family from the city's gritty underworld.

title: Gaalodu
subTitle: After fighting with a villager's son, Raju leaves for the big city, and there he meets Shukla, a nice woman from a rich family. However, this chance meeting could change Raju's life.

title: Surya Ka Yaarana
subTitle: A soldier going on a rescue mission, hears about his father's death by lung cancer and mournfully looks back on his memories of how he helped him in matters of love and life.

title: Surya Ka Yaarana
subTitle: A soldier going on a rescue mission, hears about his father's death by lung cancer and mournfully looks back on his memories of how he helped him in matters of love and life.

title: The Fighter Mard No. 1
subTitle: An honest police officer, Prabhakaran, puts a notorious gangster, Easwaramoorthy, behind bars. When Easwaramoorthy learns of his identity, he decides to take revenge by targeting Prabhakaran's sister.

title: Friday The 13th
subTitle: The 13th page of a mysterious book harbours evil. It gives rise to a series of devastating events as people who read it, get possessed by demonic spirits.

title: Nagashaurya's Aswathama
subTitle: A man returns to India for his sister's engagement ceremony but discovers that something terrible has happened to her. On his quest for the truth, he uncovers a series of crimes against women.

title: LIE
subTitle: Sathyam and Chaitra meet unexpectedly in their pursuit of making quick money. Soon, after they fall in love, Sathyam encounters Padmanabham, a criminal on the run from the Indian police.

title: Manjulika Returns 2
subTitle: Four strangers across different walks of life serendipitously meet at a haunted graveyard. However, luck turns to misery when an insidious force awakens.

title: Geethanjali Malli Vachindi
subTitle: Sreenu receives a directorial offer from Vishnu to shoot in a bungalow. Later, he and his crew realise that Vishnu orchestrated the ploy to seek revenge by trapping them in a haunted house.

title: Satyabhama
subTitle: ACP Satyabhama embarks on an investigation into a missing person case, which leads her to uncover dark secrets hidden within the town. However, as she delves deeper, her past begins to haunt her.

title: Sita Ram
subTitle: Ram, a young boy, lives in a monastery waiting for Sita to return and take care of him. However, Sita returns, years later, but with an ulterior motive.

title: Hidimbha
subTitle: In Hyderabad, a series of murders targets young girls. Later, officers Aadhya and Abhay investigate as more victims disappear, soon discovering a common link among them.

title: Nartanasala
subTitle: Radha Krishna, who runs a self-defence class for women, falls in love with Manasa. When his father fixes his marriage with Satya, he comes up with a lie to escape from the situation.
